ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the agent is being trained */,
  "policy" TEXT /* Policy or algorithm used to train the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the agent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the agent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the agent */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the agent's software or hardware */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the agent */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the environment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment */,
  "complexity_level" TEXT /* Level of complexity of the environment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the policy */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the policy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_steps" (
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time step */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent being trained */,
  "time_step" INTEGER /* Time step during which the agent is being trained */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the time step was recorded */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the time step */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the time step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_steps_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step during which the observation was made */,
  "observation" TEXT /* Details of the observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the observation was recorded */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that made the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step during which the action was taken */,
  "action" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was recorded */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step during which the reward was received */,
  "reward" REAL /* Value of the reward */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reward was recorded */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "human_obs" (
  "human_obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each human observation */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step during which the human observation was made */,
  "human_obs" TEXT /* Details of the human observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the human observation was recorded */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the human observer */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("human_obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_obs_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "avg_action_dist" (
  "avg_action_dist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average action distribution */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step during which the average action distribution was calculated */,
  "avg_action_dist" TEXT /* Details of the average action distribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the average action distribution was calculated */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the average action distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("avg_action_dist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_avg_action_dist_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "original_rewards" (
  "original_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each original reward */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step during which the original reward was received */,
  "original_reward" REAL /* Value of the original reward */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the original reward was recorded */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of original reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the original reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("original_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_original_rewards_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logstd_action_dist" (
  "logstd_action_dist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log standard deviation of the action distribution */,
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time step during which the log standard deviation of the action distribution was calculated */,
  "logstd_action_dist" TEXT /* Details of the log standard deviation of the action distribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log standard deviation was calculated */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the log standard deviation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logstd_action_dist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logstd_action_dist_time_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_step_id") REFERENCES time_steps ("time_step_id")
)
